note:
华盛顿（CNN）美国调查人员在赎金中恢复了数百万美元的加密货币，到了袭击事项的袭击促使促进关键东海岸管道的袭击，根据此事。
 人民在此事上介绍的是，周一，周一的司法部预计将宣布由联邦调查局领导的经营的细节。
 赎金恢复是一家罕见的成果，该公司将遭受衰弱的网络攻击灾害犯罪持有的赎金软件的灾害。
     Colonial Pipeline Co. Ceo Joseph Blount在上个月出版的采访中告诉华尔街日报，该公司遵守了440万美元的赎金需求，因为官员没有知道黑客入侵的程度以及需要多长时间恢复操作。
    但在幕后，公司已经提前措施通知联邦调查局并遵循指示，帮助调查人员跟踪黑客使用的加密货币钱包，相信在俄罗斯。美国官员将殖民袭击与被称为暗区的刑法集团联系起来，据说与其他刑事黑客分享其恶意软件工具。
  司法部的发言人拒绝发表评论，CNN已达到殖民地管道运营商。
 CNN先前报道，美国官员正在寻找黑客和＃39中的任何可能的洞;运营或个人安全旨在识别负责人的行为者 - 特别监测任何可能出现在他们搬运金钱的情况下，这是熟悉努力的一个来源。 
拜登政府在较少的加密货币支付架构中归零，这允许更大的匿名性，因为它在关键基础设施的两个主要事件之后争取损害其努力扰乱日益增长和日益破坏性的赎金软件攻击。
  ＆＃34;滥用加密货币是一个大规模的推动者，＆＃34;副国家安全顾问Anne Neuberger告诉CNN。 ＆＃34;那种人们把钱从中拿出来。关于匿名和加强加密货币的兴起，混合器服务的兴起基本上是基本的资金。＆＃34;
 ＆＃34;个人公司感受到压力下 - 特别是如果他们没有完成网络安全工作 - 以偿还赎金并继续前进，＆＃34; Neuberger补充道。 ＆＃34;但在长期，那个＆＃39; s驱动着正在进行的赎金[攻击]。越多的人获得了更大，更大的赎退和越来越多的潜在中断。＆＃34;
  虽然拜登行政当局明确了私营公司的帮助，但彻底遏制了初期的赎金软件攻击，因此联邦机构擅长用于支付赎金瓶组的追踪货币，CNN先前报道。
 但政府＆＃39;响应赎金软件攻击的能力是非常＆＃34;情境依赖，＆＃34;两个消息人士上周表示。
 其中一个来源指出，帮助恢复支付给赎金制品演员的资金肯定是美国政府可以提供援助的领域，但是指出，成功急剧各异，主要取决于攻击者中是否存在洞和＃39;系统可以识别和剥削。
 在某些情况下，美国官员可以找到赎金软件运营商和＆＃34;自己的＆＃34;他们的网络在攻击时期，其中一个来源解释，注意到允许相关机构监控演员和＃39; S通信，并可能识别负责的集团中的其他关键播放器。 
消息来源，当勒索软件演员更加小心，包括他们如何移动资金，扰乱他们的网络或追踪货币变得更加复杂。
 ＆＃34;它真的是一个混合的袋子，＆＃34;他们告诉CNN，参考这些攻击中涉及的团体所证明的不同程度的复杂程度。
 其中一个来源还警告，对美国政府行动的股票造成了太多的股票，讲述了CNN各攻击和细节水平有效采取行动的独特情节是有效采取行动，这是其中有＆＃34的一部分原因子弹＆＃34;谈到违反赎金软件攻击时。
 ＆＃34;它将采取改进的防御，破坏赎金软件的盈利能力和攻击者的指导行动，以使此停止，＆＃34;该源添加了，清楚地清除了中断和追踪加密货币付款仅是等式的一部分。
 这种情绪被网络安全专家呼应，他们同意勒索瓶演员使用加密货物来洗涤他们的交易。
 ＆＃34;在比特币时代，洗钱是任何书呆子可以做的东西。你不再需要一个大有组织犯罪设备，＆＃34;据Alex Stamos称，前Facebook首席安全官员，联合创始人Krebs Stamos集团。
   ＆＃34;我们唯一的方式＆＃39;重新将能够反击，因为整个社会都是为了使它违法......我认为我们必须支付付款，＆＃34;他加了。 ＆＃34;这将是非常艰难的。第一家公司曾经打过的公司＆＃39;非法支付，他们将在一个非常坚韧的地方。我们和我们＆＃39;再看很多痛苦和痛苦。＆＃34;
note_en:
Washington (CNN)US investigators have recovered millions of dollars in cryptocurrency paid in ransom to hackers whose  attack prompted the shutdown of the key East Coast pipeline last month, according to people briefed on the matter.
 The Justice Department on Monday is expected to announce details of the operation led by the FBI with the cooperation of the Colonial Pipeline operator, the people briefed on the matter said.
 The ransom recovery is a rare outcome for a company that has fallen victim to a debilitating cyberattack in the booming criminal business of ransomware.
     Colonial Pipeline Co. CEO Joseph Blount told The Wall Street Journal In an  interview published last month that the company complied with the $4.4 million ransom demand because officials didn't know the extent of the intrusion by hackers and how long it would take to restore operations.
    But behind the scenes, the company had taken early steps to notify the FBI and followed instructions that helped investigators track the payment to a cryptocurrency wallet used by the hackers, believed to be based in Russia. US officials have linked the Colonial attack to a criminal hacking group known as Darkside that is said to share its malware tools with other criminal hackers.
  A spokesman for the Justice Department declined to comment, and CNN has reached out to the Colonial Pipeline operator.
 CNN previously reported that US officials were looking for any possible holes in the hackers' operational or personal security in an effort to identify the actors responsible -- specifically monitoring for any leads that might emerge out of the way they move their money, one of the sources familiar with the effort said.
 The Biden administration has zeroed in on the less regulated architecture of cryptocurrency payments which allows for greater anonymity as it ramps up its efforts to disrupt the growing and increasingly destructive ransomware attacks, following two major incidents on critical infrastructure.
  "The misuse of cryptocurrency is a massive enabler here," Deputy National Security Advisor Anne Neuberger told CNN. "That's the way folks get the money out of it. On the rise of anonymity and enhancing cryptocurrencies, the rise of mixer services that essentially launder funds."
 "Individual companies feel under pressure - particularly if they haven't done the cybersecurity work -- to pay off the ransom and move on," Neuberger added. "But in the long-term, that's what drives the ongoing ransom [attacks]. The more folks get paid the more it drives bigger and bigger ransoms and more and more potential disruption."
  While the Biden administration has made clear it needs help from private companies to stem the recent wave of ransomware attacks, federal agencies are adept at tracing currency used to pay ransomware groups, CNN previously reported.
 But the government's ability to effectively do so in response to a ransomware attack is very "situationally dependent," two sources said last week.
 One of the sources noted that helping recover money paid to ransomware actors is certainly an area where the US government can provide assistance but noted that success varies dramatically and largely depends on whether there are holes in the attackers' system that can be identified and exploited.
 In some cases, US officials can find the ransomware operators and "own" their network within hours of an attack, one of the sources explained, noting that allows relevant agencies to monitor the actor's communications and potentially identify additional key players in the group responsible.
 When ransomware actors are more careful with their operational security, including in how they move money, disrupting their networks or tracing the currency becomes more complicated, the sources added.
 "It's really a mixed bag," they told CNN, referring to the varying degrees of sophistication demonstrated by groups involved in these attacks.
 One of the sources also cautioned against putting too much stock in US government actions, telling CNN that the unique circumstances around each attack and level of detail needed to effectively take action against these groups is part of the reason there is "no silver bullet" when it comes to countering ransomware attacks.
 "It will take improved defenses, breaking up the profitability of ransomware and directed action on the attackers to make this stop," the source added, making clear that disrupting and tracing cryptocurrency payments is only one part of the equation.
 That sentiment has been echoed by cybersecurity experts who agree that ransomware actors use cryptocurrency to launder their transactions.
 "In the Bitcoin era, laundering money is something that any nerd can do. You don't need a big organized crime apparatus anymore," according to Alex Stamos, former Facebook chief security officer, co-founder Krebs Stamos Group.
   "The only way we're going to be able to strike back against that as an entire society is by making it illegal ... I do think we have to outlaw payments," he added. "That is going to be really tough. The first companies to get hit once it's illegal to pay, they're going to be in a very tough spot. And we're going to see a lot of pain and suffering."
title: 来源：美国调查员已恢复数百万美元的加密货币，即去年赎金中赎金的殖民地管道支付给黑客
title_en: Sources: US investigators have recovered millions of dollars worth of cryptocurrency that the Colonial Pipeline paid in ransom to hackers last month

note:
在今天的WWDC主题演讲期间，Apple推出了一个新的ICLoud +服务，并与iCloud存储一起使用新功能。 iCloud +包括三个新功能，苹果不是提高iCloud的价格。
  私有继电器是iCloud +的标题新功能。通过私人继电器，所有带有设备的流量都被加密并通过两个单独的继电器发送。 Apple说，没有人，甚至不是Apple，可以访问或查看此数据。此功能听起来很像Apple VPN。
 隐藏我的电子邮件是邮件，Safari和其他服务中内置的新功能，它允许您随机化，唯一的电子邮件转发到您的主帐户。这意味着您可以将您的电子邮件从服务中隐藏，以增加隐私。
 iCloud +还包括无限的主页安全摄像机。目前，iCloud用户仅限于每个帐户的五个摄像机，但此限制已为iCloud +删除。
 在我们的完全重新覆盖之前，追赶Apple从WWDC 2021的所有公告。

note_en:
During its WWDC keynote today, Apple unveiled a new iCloud+ service with new features alongside iCloud storage. iCloud+ includes three new features, and Apple is not raising the prices of iCloud.
  Private Relay is the headlining new feature of iCloud+. Through Private Relay, all traffic leaving your device is encrypted and sent through two separate relays. Apple says that no one, not even Apple, can access or view this data. This feature sounds quite a bit like an Apple VPN.
 Hide My Email is a new feature built into Mail, Safari, and other services and it allows you to randomized, unique emails that forward to your main account. This means you can hide your email from services for increased privacy.
 iCloud+ also includes unlimited HomeKit Secure Video cameras. Currently, iCloud users are limited to five cameras per account, but this limit has been removed for iCloud+.
 Catch up on all of Apple’s announcements from WWDC 2021 in  our full recap right here.
  You’re reading 9to5Mac — experts who break news about Apple and its surrounding ecosystem, day after day. title_en: Apple debuts iCloud+ as part of iCloud plans, featuring Hide My Email, Private Relay for encrypting device traffic and bouncing it through relays, and more

note:
Apple刚刚在WWDC 2021宣布，它将Safari Web浏览器扩展带入其移动设备。使用iOS 15和iPados 15，iPhone和iPad将访问Safari for Mac中的相同Web扩展。
  Web浏览器扩展用于向浏览器添加更多功能，以及广告拦截器，VPN，密码管理器等内容。以前仅限于Mac上的Safari，Web浏览器扩展现在正在iPhone和iPad上的Safari与iOS 15。
 开发人员现在将能够在今年晚些时候使用新软件创建在Mac，iPhone和iPad上工作的通用扩展。
 有趣的是，在Apple与Google，Mozilla和Microsoft合作，以改善Safari，Chrome，Firefox和Edge的通用浏览器扩展。去年6月，Apple在麦克斯版Safari中添加了对WebExtension API的支持。此API是一个跨平台技术，用于在不同的Web浏览器中提供相同的扩展，包括Google Chrome和Microsoft Edge。
 IOS 15，IPADOS 15和MacOS 12将于公众提供这一秋季。
  您正在阅读9To5MAC  - 在日复一日的日复一日地打破苹果及其周围生态系统的新闻的专家。请务必查看我们的主页，以了解所有最新消息，然后在Twitter，Facebook和LinkedIn上关注9to5Mac以留在循环中。不知道从哪里开始？查看我们的独家故事，评论，How-TO，以及订阅我们的YouTube频道
note_en:
Apple just announced at WWDC 2021 that it is bringing Safari web browser extensions to its mobile devices. With iOS 15 and iPadOS 15, iPhone and iPad will have access to the same web extensions available in Safari for Mac.
  Web browser extensions are used to add more features to a browser, with things like ad blockers, VPNs, password managers, and much more. Previously restricted to Safari on the Mac, web browser extensions are now coming to Safari on the iPhone and iPad with iOS 15.
 Developers will now be able to create universal extensions that work on Mac, iPhone, and iPad with the new software available later this year.
 Interestingly, this comes after  Apple teamed up with Google, Mozilla, and Microsoft to improve universal browser extensions for Safari, Chrome, Firefox, and Edge. In June last year, Apple added support for  WebExtension API in the macOS version of Safari. This API is a cross-platform technology for offering the same extension in different web browsers, including Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge.
 iOS 15, iPadOS 15, and macOS 12 will be available to the public this fall.

title_en: Apple details upcoming updates to Safari, with better tab management and Tab Groups, extensions on iOS and iPadOS, and a more compact design on macOS

note_en:
Apple today announced its own continuous integration system called ‘Xcode Cloud’. Xcode Cloud allows developers to commit code which is then built on Apple’s servers. Test suites can then be performed in parallel whilst the local developer continues to do other things.
 Apple is also bringing TestFlight to the Mac for the first time. This allows developers to easily distribute beta builds of their software to a test pool of users.
  Pricing for Xcode Cloud was not announced. Apple said it will share more information later in the year.

title_en: Apple brings TestFlight to the Mac and launches Xcode Cloud, a continuous integration system that can offload the app build process from Macs

note:
在今天早上的开球到WWDC，公司揭开了MacOS 12  - 命名，你猜到了，蒙特里。通用控制是这里的顶级新功能，这进一步弥补了桌面和平板电脑之间的差距。将iPad粘贴在Mac旁边，您可以使用相同的触控板和键盘在设备之间移动光标。该功能可立即使用最多三个设备。
   Airplay到Mac也会模糊，让您将内容直接投入到您的大型桌面屏幕上 - 这对于像我这样的怪人很好，那些没有电视。现在也在MacOS上使用快捷方式，允许现有的自动化自动化更简单。用户将能够将AutomAlt Workflows直接导入流行的移动应用程序的桌面版本。它将是一个多年的转换，但撕裂自动化 - 你将被遗漏（种类）。快捷方式将来到Siri，Spotlight，菜单栏和查找器开始。
  当然，Safari正在获得一些更新。浏览器前面的最大新闻是Tab组的到来 - 这在它的声音或多或少。用户可以将选项卡分组为捆绑包，可以与其他用户共享。这是很多内容，可能需要重新思考许多用户的工作流程。但至少标签栏本身正在获得更清晰，更精简。
 还有新的是桌面扩展，现在可以使用iOS和iPados。桌面现在也支持AirPods Pro上的空间音频，Launchpad现在具有游戏文件夹，可以在一个地方获得内容，并且可以在登录屏幕上显示备忘录。
 一些不错的补充，但预计，蒙特雷并不代表大血管的更新。这里有一些很好的新功能，但似乎很可能发生在引擎盖下的大部分内容，因为公司继续在其新系统中改进苹果硅体验。
 公共测试版将于下个月上市。蒙特雷将为所有用户提供此秋季。
note_en:
At this morning’s kickoff to WWDC, the company unveiled macOS 12 — named, you guessed it, Monterey. Universal Control is the top line new feature here, which further bridges the gap between desktop and tablet. Sticking the iPad next to a Mac, you can move the cursor between devices using the same trackpad and keyboard. The feature works on up to three devices at once.
   AirPlay to Mac also blurs that let’s you cast content directly to your big desktop screen — that’s nice for weirdos like me who don’t have a TV. Shortcuts are also now available on macOS, allowing for simpler automation that the existing Automater. Users will be able to import Automater workflows directly to the desktop version of the popular mobile app. It will be a multi-year transition, but rip Automater — you will be missed (kind of). Shortcuts will be coming to Siri, Spotlight, the menu bar and Finder to start.
  Safari is getting some updates, of course. The biggest piece of news on the browser front is the arrival of Tab Groups — which is more or less as it sounds. Users can group tabs into bundles, which can be shared with other users. That’s a lot of content and will probably require a rethink of many users workflows. But at least the tab bar itself is getting cleaner and more streamlined.
 Also new are desktop extensions that can now be with iOS and iPadOS. Desktops also now support Spatial Audio on the AirPods Pro, LaunchPad now features a games folder to get that content all in one place and Memojis can be displayed on the login screen.
 Some nice additions, but as expect, Monterey doesn’t represent as big an update as Big Sur. There are some nice new features here, but it seems likely that much of the big news is happening under the hood, as the company continues to refine the Apple Silicon experience across its new systems.
 Public beta will go live next month. Monterey will be available for all users this fall.
title: Apple推出MacOS 12 Monterey，通过通用控制，使用相同的触控板在iPad和Mac之间移动光标，使用相同的触控板，播放到Mac，快捷方式等
title_en: Apple unveils macOS 12 Monterey, with Universal Control, to move the cursor between iPad and Mac using the same trackpad, AirPlay to Mac, Shortcuts, and more

note: 首次，您可以在iPad本身上代码，迭代和构建应用程序。 在iPados 15上使用Swift Playrounds，客户将能够从头开始创建iPhone和iPad应用程序，然后将它们部署到App Store。  它仍有待观察到的是有限的发展经验。 Apple选择不重新命名为“Xcode”是值得注意的，表示您不会能够完成与Mac上Xcode可以执行的所有内容。  尽管如此，它是iPad的重要里程碑。 如果不需要其他设备，用户将能够在iPad本身上开发应用程序。  您正在阅读9To5MAC  - 在日复一日的日复一日地打破苹果及其周围生态系统的新闻的专家。 请务必查看我们的主页，以了解所有最新消息，然后在Twitter，Facebook和LinkedIn上关注9to5Mac以留在循环中。 不知道从哪里开始？ 查看我们的独家故事，评论，How-TO，以及订阅我们的YouTube频道
note_en:
For the first time, you can code, iterate and build apps on the iPad itself. Using Swift Playgrounds on iPadOS 15, customers will be able to create iPhone and iPad apps from scratch and then deploy them to the App Store.
 It remains to be seen how limited or not the development experience will be. It is probably notable that Apple chose not to rebrand this as ‘Xcode’, signifying that you aren’t going to be able to do everything you can do with Xcode on the Mac.
  Nevertheless, it’s a significant milestone for the iPad. Without requiring other devices, users will be able to develop apps on the iPad itself.
  You’re reading 9to5Mac — experts who break news about Apple and its surrounding ecosystem, day after day. Be sure to check out  our homepage for all the latest news, and follow 9to5Mac on  Twitter,  Facebook, and  LinkedIn to stay in the loop. Don’t know where to start? Check out our  exclusive stories,  reviews,  how-tos, and  subscribe to our YouTube channel
title: 使用iPados 15上的Swift Playrounds，用户可以在iPad上构建应用程序，并首次将它们部署到App Store
title_en: With Swift Playgrounds on iPadOS 15, users can build apps on the iPad and deploy them to the App Store for the first time

note:
展示其最强大的iPad Pro设备后几周，Apple今天宣布了最新版本的iPados  - 并且有一个明确的专注使Apple的Pablets生产力机器更具能力。至少如果您发现自己使用拆分屏幕模式很多，那就是。否则，平台没有任何激进的变化。
 如磁传闻，iPados 15将使主屏幕更加自定制，并允许更灵活地放置小部件。您现在可以将它们粘贴到您想要的任何地方，这是去年14 14的一种能力。但是iPados 14没有提供相同的功能，但除了平板电脑的庞大屏幕房地产，才能将小部件放在今天的侧栏中。
 Apple还将应用程序库带到iPados。就像iPhone一样，它会让您通过归档应用程序来维护一个较少杂乱的主屏幕，您很少使用自动组织的文件夹。在iPad上，App库位于码头。
 多任务处理也得到了一些急需的细化。新图标将使进入拆分模式更简单，Apple还提到了一个“货架”功能，使其更容易混合不同的任务。对于目前在iPados上运行的多任务方式，这是一个重要的变化，似乎是一个重大改进。
   Quicknote是一种新的便利，可以让您将注释附加到网页和IPADO的其他区域，使其更易于回馈。
     IPADOS 15还将分享到iOS 15的许多新功能和经验。FaceTime呼叫现在将支持空间音频以获取更逼真，自然的声音。语音隔离功能将让您的声音通过背景噪声切割，并且“宽频谱”选项将取出比以前更好的声音。纵向模式也来到FaceTime，导致模糊的背景，使关注面上的脸部。
 Apple正在为FaceTime介绍一个新的分数特征，允许人们分享媒体 - 音乐，电影等 - 在组呼叫中。 SharePlay将利用IOS功能，如图片In-Movell-In-In-Movell-In-Indoply of Himber-Devices的无缝体验。 
新的iPad软件更新包括用于帮助您焦点的新工具，如改进的通知，更容易识别，并将您的不太重要的通知重新识别和“通知摘要”部分。您还可以自定义在当天的不同点看到哪些通知，允许您分离工作和个人警报。焦点偏好在Apple设备上同步。
 照片应用程序现在可以使用基于歌曲的氛围的自动过滤器和效果来同步音乐曲目，并且聚焦搜索也获得了一些更深的搜索功能。 Live Text是一种使用On-Device Intelligence的功能，以允许您从您所拍摄的照片中选择文本以及相机滚动中的文件。它支持七种语言。
  M1供电的iPad专业人员与Apple的最新IMAC，MacBook Air，13英寸MacBook Pro和Mac Mini在纯粹的性能方面相同。他们的发布只需要呼唤Apple将iPados进入一个平台，该平台可以正确利用这些电源的那些试图使用设备作为笔记本电脑更换。使用iPad是一种奇妙的体验，当您遇到其软件限制时，可能会定期转化令人沮丧。
 在WWDC前的WWDC愿望列表中是多用户支持，更高级的文件应用程序，更好地支持外部显示器，以及最终切割和逻辑等Pro-Caliber应用程序，使其进入iPad。 Apple并没有在今天的主题演讲中解决许多想要的人。最“Pro”的能力宣布是使用SWIFT游乐场创建和送货应用程序的能力。所以我们必须看看其他改进和惊喜iPados 15可能会在未来几周内进入测试版。
 开发......我们向这篇文章添加了更多信息，但您可以随时随地跟随我们的WWDC 2021 Live Blog，以便更快地获得新闻。
note_en:
Weeks after introducing its  most powerful iPad Pro devices ever, Apple is today announcing the latest version of iPadOS — and there’s a clear focus on making Apple’s tablets more capable productivity machines. At least if you find yourself using split-screen mode a lot, that is. Otherwise, there aren’t any radical changes for the platform.
 As rumored, iPadOS 15 will make the homescreen more customizable and allow for more flexible placement of widgets. You can now stick them anywhere you’d like, a capability that came to iOS 14 last year. But iPadOS 14 didn’t offer the same functionality, and widgets could only be placed in the Today View sidebar despite the tablet’s vast screen real estate.
 Apple is also bringing the App Library to iPadOS. Much like on the iPhone, it will let you maintain a less-cluttered homescreen by filing away the apps you rarely use to an automatically organized section of folders. On iPads, the App Library is located in the dock.
 Multitasking is also getting some much-needed refinement. New icons will make it simpler to go into split-view mode, and Apple also mentioned a “shelf” feature that makes it easier to jumble different tasks. It’s a significant change to how multitasking currently works on iPadOS, and it seems like a major improvement.
   QuickNote is a new convenience that will let you attach notes to webpages and other areas of iPadOS, making them easier to get back to.
     iPadOS 15 will also share many of the new features and experiences that are coming to iOS 15. FaceTime calls will now support spatial audio for more lifelike, natural sound. A voice isolation feature will let your voice cut through background noise, and a “wide spectrum” option will pick up  more sound than before. Portrait mode is also coming to FaceTime, resulting in a blurred background that keeps the focus on your face.
 Apple is introducing a new SharePlay feature for FaceTime that allows people to share media — music, movies, etc. — together on a group call. SharePlay will leverage iOS features like picture-in-picture, iMessage, and more for a seamless experience across multiple devices at the same time.
 The new iPad software update includes new tools meant to help you focus, like revamped notifications that are easier to identify and a “notification summary” section that recaps your less-than-essential notifications. You can also customize which notifications you’ll see at different points of the day, allowing you to separate work and personal alerts. Focus preferences are synced across Apple devices.
 Memories in the Photos app can now synced up with music tracks with automatic filters and effects applied based on the vibe of the song, and Spotlight search is also getting some deeper search capabilities. Live Text is a feature that uses on-device intelligence to let you select text from photos you’ve taken and those in your camera roll. It supports seven languages.
  The M1-powered iPad Pros are on equal footing with Apple’s latest iMac, MacBook Air, 13-inch MacBook Pro, and Mac Mini in terms of sheer performance. Their release has only fueled calls for Apple to evolve iPadOS into a platform that can properly take advantage of all that power for those trying to use the devices as laptop replacements. Using an iPad is a fantastic experience that can regularly turn frustrating when you run into its software limitations.
 On the pre-WWDC wishlist of some users were things like multi-user support, a more advanced Files app, better support for external displays, and pro-caliber apps like Final Cut and Logic making their way to the iPad. Apple didn’t address many of those wants in today’s keynote. The most “pro” capability announced was the ability to create and ship apps using Swift Playgrounds. So we’ll have to see what other improvements and surprises iPadOS 15 may hold as it enters beta in the coming weeks.
 Developing… we’re adding more to this post, but you can follow along with our   WWDC 2021 live blog  to get the news even faster.
title: Apple详细信息iPados 15更新，介绍了较大的小部件，应用库，改进的多任务处理以及在主屏幕上的任何位置放置小部件的能力
title_en: Apple details iPadOS 15 updates, introducing larger widgets, App Library, improved multitasking, and the ability to place widgets anywhere on home screen

note:
新地图经验自于美国，U.K.，爱尔兰和加拿大推出以来，现在开始前往西班牙和葡萄牙。然后，我将于今年晚些时候在意大利和澳大利亚抵达意大利和澳大利亚，在星期一的全球开发人员会议期间在其主题演讲期间宣布。
   此外，Apple表示，iOS 15地图将包括商业区，玛林纳斯，建筑物等新详情。此外，Apple已添加如海拔，新的道路颜色和标签，以及数百种定制设计的地标 - 例如，用于金门大桥等地方。
 它说，Apple还为“Moonlit Glow”的地图建立了一个新的夜间模式，说。
  对于司机来说，Apple将新的道路详细信息添加到地图上，因此它可以帮助司机在整个城市移动，更好地看到并理解转向车道，中位数，公共汽车和出租车车道等重要事物。这些变化具有竞争力，谷歌已经达到了自己的谷歌地图平台，它在选择城市中带来了街道级细节。这些允许的人 - 包括在脚上导航的人，在骑自行车上或在踏板车上驾驶，例如 - 更好地看到人行道和交叉口等事情。
 Apple现在正在追赶，说它也将展示人行横道和自行车车道这样的功能。
 它还将呈现像在3D空间中重叠的复杂交换一样的东西，使得更容易看到即将到来的交通状况或车道。这些功能将在今年晚些时候来到Carplay。
   用户现在可以将他们最喜欢的行钉固定在顶部，甚至在他们的Apple手表上跟踪，所以他们不必拔出他们的手机。更新的地图应用程序将自动遵循您的Transit Route，并将您通知您的下船，使应用程序更竞争的是经常被过境的应用程序，例如CityMapper，例如CityMapper。 
当您退出您的电台时，您现在还可以持有iPhone以扫描区域内的建筑物，地图将产生准确的位置，提供增强现实的方向。 这与去年宣布的Live View AR指示相似。  Apple表示，此功能在2021年在2021年的选择城市推出，苹果公司表示。
note_en:
The new map experience has since launched in the U.S., U.K., Ireland and Canada and will now make its way to Spain and Portugal, starting today. I will then arrive in Italy and Australia later this year, Apple announced during its keynote address during its Worldwide Developer Conference on Monday.
   In addition, Apple said iOS 15 Maps will include new details for commercial districts, marinas, buildings, and more. Plus, Apple has added things like elevation, new road colors and labels, as well as hundreds of custom designed landmarks — for example, for places like the Golden Gate Bridge.
 Apple also built a new nighttime mode for Maps with a “moonlit glow,” it said.
  For drivers, Apple added new road details to the map, so it can help drivers as they move throughout a city to better see and understand important things like turn lanes, medians, bus and taxi lanes, and other things. The changes are competitive with some of the updates Google has been  making as of late to its own Google Maps platform, which brought street-level details in select cities. These allowed people — including those navigating on foot, in a wheelchair, on a bike, or on a scooter, for example — to better see things like sidewalks and intersections.
 Apple is now catching up, saying it, too, will show features like crosswalks and bike lanes.
 It will also render things like overlapping complex interchanges in 3D space, making it easier to see upcoming traffic conditions or what lane to take. These features will come to CarPlay later in the year.
   Users can now pin their favorite lines to the top, and even keep track on their Apple Watch so they don’t have to pull out their phone. The updated Maps app will automatically follow your transit route and notify you when it’s time to disembark, making the app more competitive to third-party apps often favored by transit takers, like Citymapper, for instance.
  When you exit your station, you can also now hold up your iPhone to scan the buildings in the area and Maps will generate an accurate position, offering direction in augmented reality. This is similar to  the Live View AR directions Google announced last year.
 This feature is launching in select cities in 2021 with more to come in the year ahead, Apple said.
title: Apple更新IOS 15中的地图，以带来更多详细的地图，传输功能，AR视图等
title_en: Apple updates Maps in iOS 15 to bring more detailed maps, transit features, AR view, and more

note: Apple的Digital Assistant Siri将在iOS 15中默认处理Audio On-Device，这意味着您将能够在没有活动Internet连接的情况下使用该功能。 Apple表示升级也将更快地使Siri更快。  Apple说，处理Audio On-Device将使用Siri更私密使用。 这遵循该公司对实现机器学习功能的良好良好的偏好，而不是将数据发送到要处理的云。  “这解决了语音助手的最大隐私问题之一，即不需要的音频录制，”Apple在新闻语句中说。  显然，如果您没有Internet连接，那么您将无法执行某些SIRI功能，如搜索Web。 但是，您可以使用Apple的数字助手进行简单的导航任务，例如控制您的音乐，打开应用程序，设置计时器等。 使这些功能可访问离线是可访问性的很大移动。
note_en:
Apple’s digital assistant Siri will process audio on-device by default in iOS 15, meaning you will be able to use the feature without an active internet connection. Apple says the upgrade will also make Siri faster.
 Processing audio on-device will make using Siri more private, says Apple. This follows the company’s well-established preference for  implementing machine learning features on-device, rather than sending data away to the cloud to be processed.
 “This addresses one of the biggest privacy concerns for voice assistants, which is unwanted audio recording,” said Apple in a  press statement.
   Obviously, if you don’t have an internet connection then you won’t be able to carry out certain Siri functions like  searching the web. But you can use Apple’s digital assistant for simple navigational tasks, like controlling your music, opening apps, setting timers and so on. Making these functions accessible offline is a great move for accessibility, too.
title: Apple宣布对Siri的更新，包括默认处理音频设备，并使助手更响应
title_en: Apple announces updates to Siri, including processing audio on-device by default and making the assistant more responsive

note:
Siri终于来到第三方设备。 Apple在其WWDC主题演讲中宣布，HomeKit配件制造商将能够在今年晚些时候将Siri语音控制整合到他们的设备中。如果设备连接到网络，则语音助手将通过主页进行路由。
 Apple尚未发布将支持Siri的全面的设备和品牌列表。该公司在其WWDC主题演示期间将其演示在Ecobee恒温器上。
 Apple还宣布了许多新的智能家居功能。 Home Keys允许您远程锁定和解锁门，现在在钱包应用程序中得到支持。
   HomePod Mini将在今年晚些时候支持Apple Music中的无损音频，并将能够用作电视扬声器，就像您目前与已停止的全尺寸主页一样一样。 HomePod也现在支持Apple TV的命令，并且分享现在与Apple TV合作。谈到Apple TV，它现在支持“与您共享”功能，允许用户通过TVOS分享电视节目。
   Apple Watch现在支持HomePod的对讲功能，这将允许您与手腕兼容的视频门铃和访问包检测。您将能够在相机视图中控制附近的HomeKit配件。
note_en:
Siri is finally coming to third-party devices. Apple announced at its WWDC keynote that HomeKit accessory makers will be able to integrate Siri voice control into their devices later this year. The voice assistant will be routed through a HomePod if the devices are connected to your network.
 Apple hasn’t released a comprehensive list of devices and brands that will support Siri. The company demoed it on an Ecobee thermostat during its WWDC keynote presentation.
 Apple also announced a number of new smart home features. Home Keys, which allow you to remotely lock and unlock doors, are now supported in the Wallet app.
   The HomePod Mini will support lossless audio in Apple Music later this year and will be able to function as a TV speaker, like you can currently do with the discontinued full-size HomePod. HomePods also now support commands for the Apple TV, and SharePlay now works with Apple TV. Speaking of Apple TV, it now supports the “Shared with You” feature, which allows users to share TV shows via tvOS.
   And the Apple Watch now supports the HomePod’s intercom feature, which will allow you to talk to compatible video doorbells and access package detection from your wrist. You’ll be able to control nearby HomeKit accessories in camera view.
title: Apple说，HomeKit配件制造商将能够将Siri语音控制整合到今年晚些时候的设备中
title_en: Apple says HomeKit accessory makers will be able to integrate Siri voice control into their devices later this year

note:
Apple宣布Airpods将获得一些生活质量改善，包括提高与您交谈的人声音的能力，更好地找到我的支持，以及宣布更广泛的通知的能力。
 Apple表示，“谈话提升”功能将帮助难以在谈话时听到其他人声音的人。它将尝试隔离您面前的人的声音，滑动员让用户控制进入的环境噪音。
   Airpods可以宣布消息和文本，但现在他们能够读出其他重要通知的能力，就像在送食物时一样。
 易于丢失的耳机也越来越多地找到了我的能力，包括类似的空中电视近似观点，告诉你你的芽是多远的。使用相同的技术，如果您即将留下您的Airpods，您的手机也能够提醒您。
 当然，Airpods将在节目早些时候宣布的FaceTime功能中支持空间音频，以及Mac和Apple TVS上的空间音频。
 开发......我们向这篇文章添加了更多信息，但您可以随时随地跟随我们的WWDC 2021 Live Blog，以便更快地获得新闻。
note_en:
Apple has announced that AirPods will be getting some quality-of-life improvements with iOS 15, including the ability to boost the sound of people talking to you, better Find My support, and the ability to announce a wider range of notifications.
 Apple says the “Conversation Boost” feature will help people who have difficulties hearing other people’s voices when they’re talking. It will try to isolate the voice of the person in front of you, with sliders that let the user control how much ambient noise is let in.
   AirPods can already announce messages and texts, but now they’re getting the ability to read out other important notifications, like when a food delivery is made.
 The easy-to-lose headphones are also getting more Find My abilities, including an AirTag-like proximity view that tells you how far away your buds are. Using the same tech, your phone will also be able to alert you if you’re about to leave your AirPods behind.
 AirPods will, of course, support the  spatial audio in FaceTime feature announced earlier in the show, as well as spatial audio on Macs and Apple TVs.
 Developing… we’re adding more to this post, but you can follow along with our   WWDC 2021 live blog  to get the news even faster.
title: Apple宣布与iOS 15一起的Airpods更新，包括促进附近谈话的声音，更好地找到我的支持，以及更多通知选项
title_en: Apple announces updates for AirPods alongside iOS 15, including boosting sound of those talking nearby, better Find My support, and more notification options

note_en:
Apple today announced that some users will be able to add their driver's license to the Wallet app in  iOS 15 this fall. This will be available in select states in the United States. If supported, you'll be able to scan your ID and store it directly in wallet.
 Like other cards and items in Wallet, your ID will be secure and encrypted. Apple is also working with the TSA so you'll be able to scan your ID when boarding certain flights.
 This is convenient, but I see privacy issues coming up for this...  i.e. we have to present ID to the police, but as of now, they cannot force us to give phone password. So what do you do?
 The privacy issues of this could be avoided if the officers have a NFC device that reads the ID just like a credit card terminal does with Apple Pay. They don’t get possession of your phone locked or unlocked. They get a valid copy of your ID which they are entitled to.
 it should not take unlocking your phone though. double click the power button to bring it up in wallet?
  Yes, but a warrant is different than being pulled over on the side of the road and they ask for "license, registration and insurance card"....so you are going to hand them you locked iPhone to take back to their patrol car?.....I don't think so! Plus Apple is going to mess with iPhone security?...allowing 3rd party apps to be installed directly without the Apple app store? No f'n way
Paying with Apple Pay can be done without unlocking your entire phone, so I assume it’s going to be similar. Only the ID will be unlocked.
 [IMG width="251px"]https://images.macrumors.com/images-new/macrumorsthreadlogo@3x.png[/IMG] ('https://www.macrumors.com/2021/06/07/apples-wallet-app-drivers-license/')  Apple today announced that some users will be able to add their driver's license to the Wallet app in iOS 15 this fall. This will be available in select states in the United States. If supported, you'll be able to scan your ID and store it directly in wallet.     Like other cards and items in Wallet, your ID will be secure and encrypted. Apple is also working with the TSA so you'll be able to scan your ID when boarding certain flights.    More to follow...  Article Link: You'll Be Able to Add Your Driver's License to Your iPhone in Select States Starting With iOS 15 ('https://www.macrumors.com/2021/06/07/apples-wallet-app-drivers-license/')
Everyone worried about handing over your phone to the police when being pulled over. You could just have your drivers license with your registration in the glove box. Problem solved.

title: Apple说，IOS 15在选择美国各州的用户将能够将驾驶执照添加到钱包这瀑布，它与TSA合作，改善航班登机

note:
Apple正在使用iOS 15中的新功能更新iPhone上的内置健康应用程序。
  Health App使用了一个名为行走稳定的新度量，让用户在实际发生之前造成评估下降的风险。 Apple还在提供更好的理解实验室结果的方法。
 Health App将在iOS 15中提出健康数据的趋势。这类似于在Apple Watch开始的活动趋势，但这些将包括更多的健康指标。
 用户还可以在第一次与医生分享来自Health应用程序的特定数据点。在iOS 15开始时，家庭之间也可以在家庭之间提供共享。这将包括趋势和警报，因此您可以远程监控亲人的健康功能（具有许可）。
 这些新功能将在今年晚些时候在iPhone 15开始。
  您正在阅读9To5MAC  - 在日复一日的日复一日地打破苹果及其周围生态系统的新闻的专家。请务必查看我们的主页，以了解所有最新消息，然后在Twitter，Facebook和LinkedIn上关注9to5Mac以留在循环中。不知道从哪里开始？查看我们的独家故事，评论，How-TO，以及订阅我们的YouTube频道
note_en:
Apple is updating the built-in Health app on the iPhone with new features in iOS 15.
  The Health app uses a new metric called Walking Steadiness to give users a risk of falling assessment before a fall actually happens. Apple is also adding a better way of understanding lab results in the Health app.
 The Health app will present trends for health data in iOS 15 as well. This is similar to Activity trends that started on Apple Watch, but these will include even more health metrics.
 Users will also be able to share specific data points from the Health app with doctors directly for the first time. Sharing is also available between families for the first time starting with iOS 15. This will include trends and alerts so you can remotely monitor loved ones health features (with permission).
 These new features will be available starting with iOS 15 for iPhone later this year.
  You’re reading 9to5Mac — experts who break news about Apple and its surrounding ecosystem, day after day. Be sure to check out  our homepage for all the latest news, and follow 9to5Mac on  Twitter,  Facebook, and  LinkedIn to stay in the loop. Don’t know where to start? title: Apple以新的行走稳定度量，基于健康数据的趋势，详细的实验室结果描述等，更新iOS 15的健康应用程序
title_en: Apple updates the Health app for iOS 15 with a new Walking Steadiness metric, trends based on health data, detailed lab result descriptions, and more

note:
Apple已正式采用IOS 15的包装，即用于iPhone用户的下一个操作系统的下一个版本。该公司表示，它设计了IOS 15，考虑到四个不同的事物。更新由Apple VP Craig Federighi提出。这是新的。
     iOS 15包括少数关于FaceTime的新功能，包括新功能，以帮助它与放大等服务竞争。
  Sialsplay可以使用可用于开发人员的API与第三方应用程序和流媒体服务合作。 Apple已经与迪士尼+，Hulu，Hbo Max，Tiktok，NBA，Twitch等工作合作。
   Apple还宣布了消息的新功能，包括轻松访问人们发给您的内容的新方法。共享堆栈将从消息中带来内容到新闻应用程序和照片应用程序。
   启用请勿打扰时，您的状态将通过消息应用程序向其他人显示
  您可以设置更改主屏幕，通知偏好等的不同“焦点”状态。
   照片应用程序现在包含一个用于识别文本的新OCR功能。 Apple表示该功能使用AI自动检测文本图像。 
Apple Pay vp Jennifer Bailey在这里通过钱包应用程序的新功能进行谈话。
 iOS 15包括您家中的新钥匙，在钱包应用程序中工作，以及自动Hotel Keys，Hyatt今年晚些时候向酒店推出Apple钱包支持
 识别卡片在今年晚些时候来到Apple钱包，加密并安全地存储在安全的飞地上
   基于当前位置的天气，天气应用程序的布局设计
   今年晚些时候，新的Apple地图界面来到西班牙和葡萄牙和澳大利亚和意大利
 Apple地图的各种设计更新，为商业区，建筑物等城市带来了更多细节。
  您正在阅读9To5MAC  - 在日复一日的日复一日地打破苹果及其周围生态系统的新闻的专家。请务必查看我们的主页，以了解所有最新消息，然后在Twitter，Facebook和LinkedIn上关注9to5Mac以留在循环中。不知道从哪里开始？查看我们的独家故事，评论，How-TO，以及订阅我们的YouTube频道
note_en:
Apple has officially taken the wraps off of iOS 15, the next version of its operating system for iPhone users. The company says it designed iOS 15 with four different things in mind. The update was presented by Apple VP Craig Federighi. Here’s what’s new.
     iOS 15 includes a handful of new features for FaceTime, including new features to help it compete with services like Zoom.
  SharePlay can work with third-party apps and streaming services using an API available to developers. Apple is already working with Disney+, Hulu, HBO Max, TikTok, NBA, Twitch, and more.
   Apple has also announced new features for Messages, including new ways to easily access content that people send you. Shared Stacks will bring over content from Messages to the News app and Photos app.
   When you enable Do Not Disturb, your status will be shown to other people via the Messages app
  You can set different “Focus” statuses that change your Home Screen, notification preferences, and more.
   The Photos app now includes a new OCR feature for recognizing text. Apple says the feature uses AI to detect text images automatically.
   Apple Pay VP Jennifer Bailey is here to talk us through new features in the Wallet app.
 iOS 15 includes new keys for your home and work in the Wallet app, as well as automatic hotel keys, Hyatt to roll out Apple Wallet support to hotels later this year
 Identify cards are coming to Apple Wallet later this year, encrypted and safely stored in the Secure Enclave
   Layout design of the Weather app changes based on the weather in your current location
   New Apple Maps interface coming to Spain and Portugal today and to Australia and Italy later this year
 A variety of design updates for Apple Maps to bring a ton more details for cities in commercial districts, buildings, and more.
  You’re reading 9to5Mac — experts who break news about Apple and its surrounding ecosystem, day after day. Be sure to check out  our homepage for all the latest news, and follow 9to5Mac on  Twitter,  Facebook, and  LinkedIn to stay in the loop. Don’t know where to start? Check out our  exclusive stories,  reviews,  how-tos, and  subscribe to our YouTube channel
title: 作为IOS 15的一部分，Apple使用空间音频，语音隔离，分享到体验视频和音乐的FaceTime，更多
title_en: As part of iOS 15, Apple updates FaceTime with spatial audio, voice isolation, SharePlay for experiencing video and music together, a web-based version, more
